task_completion.description: Create a custom block named 'Sidebar Support' containing the specified text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Custom block library' or block creation screen showing a block named 'Sidebar Support' with the body text containing 'Need help? Call 555-0199'.

task_completion.description: Place the 'User account menu' block in the 'Sidebar' region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drupal Block Layout page showing 'User account menu' listed under the 'Sidebar' region section.

task_completion.description: Place the 'Shopping Cart' block in the 'Sidebar' region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drupal Block Layout page showing 'Shopping cart' listed under the 'Sidebar' region section.

task_completion.description: Place the 'Sidebar Support' custom block in the 'Sidebar' region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drupal Block Layout page showing 'Sidebar Support' listed under the 'Sidebar' region section.

task_completion.description: Configure the blocks to be visible only to the 'Authenticated user' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Block configuration screens for the placed blocks showing the 'Roles' tab under Visibility with ONLY 'Authenticated user' checked.

task_completion.description: Configure the blocks to be hidden on checkout pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Block configuration screens showing the 'Pages' tab under Visibility with '/checkout/*' entered in the text area and the 'Hide for the listed pages' radio button selected.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal admin web interface to configure the blocks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Drupal admin UI in a web browser (e.g., /admin/structure/block), rather than using terminal commands like Drush.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to insert block configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL/PostgreSQL prompts or SQL INSERT/UPDATE commands for block configurations.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser UI elements (address bar, tabs, navigation buttons) are visible and show the correct Drupal local environment URLs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the Olivero theme's 'sidebar' region. Three blocks must be placed: 'User account menu' (system_menu_block:account), 'Shopping cart' (commerce_cart or views_block:commerce_cart_block-default), and a custom block containing the text '555-0199'. For all three blocks, visibility must be restricted to the 'Authenticated user' role (logged-in users), and page visibility must be set to 'Hide for the listed pages' with the path '/checkout/*'.
